content:
🚀 maptoposter | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Creating personalized, aesthetically pleasing map posters of any city in the world using code.
✨ Key Features: • Generate city map posters • Customizable themes and styles • Uses OpenStreetMap data via osmnx • Exportable map designs • Multilingual support with custom fonts
📖 Summary: MapToPoster is a Python script that generates minimalist map posters of cities. It leverages OpenStreetMap data and Matplotlib to create customizable visual designs based on various themes and user-defined parameters.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
